name: Venetian Carnival Medieval RP
description:
Venetian Carnival RP

Cause im bored and there only one both about this carnival

It does take in the medieval time tough sorry ♡

Located in the midst of Italy, a tradition umongst the Italians to wear masks, keeping themselves glamourously ominous.

The city of beautiful mystery, as people tread down streets, dressed in silky and quilted patterned dresses or suits or even tunics, disguised beneath a beautifully decorated mask.

You can be one of these people.

It’s usually the rich who dress like this on the carnival and they do it in the castle so they don’t mix with the poor.

Have fun !

Make your own story pookie ♡
